Parameter.name: Condition
Parameter.value: bExternalCall and not bInvalidSecurity and not bDialPlanError

Parameter.label: True: Claim control of this call
True: Claim control of this call

Step.label: Extended Place Call
Step.notes:
not StrEqlNoCase(GetAt(p_lsAttributeValues, Find(p_lsAttributeNames, "PerformCallAnalysis", 0)), "No")
Test(toI(GetAt(p_lsAttributeValues, Find(p_lsAttributeNames, "DiversionReason", 0))) > 0, toI(GetAt(p_lsAttributeValues, Find(p_lsAttributeNames, "DiversionReason", 0), 0)
Test(toI(GetAt(p_lsAttributeValues, Find(p_lsAttributeNames, "DiversionReason", 0))) > 0, toI(GetAt(p_lsAttributeValues, Find(p_lsAttributeNames, "DiversionReason", 0))), 0)

Parameter.label: Line groups (empty list means any line)
List of dial strings to be used
Include Answering Machine Detection in Call Analysis?
Silence Wait Timeout (seconds) (Starts after answering machine detected)
Use the dial plan? (allows intercom calls)
Create the call with the CallInitiationContext attribute set to this value
Call for which this is a consulting call (optional)
Diversion Reason 0: None 1: Unknown 2: Busy 3: No answer 4: Unavilable 5: Unconditional 6: Time of day 7: Do not disturb 8: Deflection 9: Follow-me 10: Out of service 11: Away 255: Other
True: Claim control of this call

Step.label: sExternalNumber
Step.notes:
Test(StrLeft(sExternalNumber, 2) = "$(", GetAt(p_lsAttributeValues, Find(p_lsAttributeNames, "PhoneNumber", 0)), sExternalNumber)
Test(StrLeft(sExternalNumber, 2) = "$(", GetAt(p_lsAttributeValues, Find(p_lsAttributeNames, "PhoneNumber", 0)), sExternalNumber
StrTrimW(GetAt(p_lsAttributeValues, Find(p_lsAttributeNames, "PhoneNumber", 0)))
